result:
The NS-SEC occupational class variables have been successfully cleaned and harmonized. The output file data/output/cleaned_data.csv has been created with 16,111 rows and 7 columns (NSID, nssec17, nssec18, nssec19, nssec20, nssec25, nssec32). The script performed the following operations:

1. Loaded all 7 wave files from data/input/ using read_delim with tab delimiter
2. Merged datasets using full_join by NSID, starting with wave 1 to ensure all NSIDs are present
3. Renamed wave-specific NS-SEC variables to standard convention (nssec + age)
4. Harmonized missing value codes to standard scheme (-9 to -1)
5. Collapsed fractional NS-SEC codes to major categories using floor()
6. Derived full-time student category (15) at age 25 using activity variable
7. Recoded NA values to -3 (not asked/interviewed)
8. Output only the required columns: NSID and nssec17, nssec18, nssec19, nssec20, nssec25, nssec32
